underlying_goal: Implement real-time participant lifecycle tracking for phone call interpretation feature, showing when call recipients connect/disconnect and auto-pausing conversations accordingly
friction_detail: Spec and plan docs were accidentally committed to the PR and had to be removed.
brief_summary: User wanted real-time Twilio participant lifecycle tracking with auto-pause on disconnect; Claude designed, planned, implemented across 12 commits with full test coverage, and shipped a PR.
